name: Thai Barbeque Marinade
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons rice wine (or sherry if you can't find it)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a food processor or with a whisk.
2. Coat the meat and leave to marinade overnight, or at least for 6 hours.
3. Barbecue, broil, or grill until cooked to your liking.
